penalties.message: A single directory contains more than 60% of files, increasing sustainability and performance risk.

issues.message: A single directory contains more than 60% of files, increasing sustainability and performance risk.

recommendations: Consider reorganising or modularising directories to reduce structural sustainability and performance risk.

issue_details.message: Large configuration or IaC file increases parsing and maintenance cost.
issue_details.suggestion: Split configuration into smaller, reusable modules.
issue_details.example: Extract shared resources into separate templates.
